plan_metadata.name: Basic Custom Engine Azure OpenAI ts Remote Debug

steps.description: Click the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the "New Project" modal dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Basic Custom Engine Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" window in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" selection dropdown at the top of the Visual Studio Code window.
Click the "Default folder /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the "Workspace Folder" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
